snapshot.content: Cycle 259: Decomposed the GitHub Action goal into 6 tasks and completed the first — marketplace research. Found that composite actions are the right fit (shell-based, no build step), no review process for publishing, and critically no existing marketplace action offers a stateful DB-backed autonomous agent cycle. Main competitors (AI GitHub Action, gh-aw, Stateful Action) are either reactive, provider-locked, or lack AI. Three in-progress goals remain blocked on credentials. GitHub Action goal now in_progress with 5 remaining tasks.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Design the action.yml schema and composite step architecture (task 2 of GitHub Action goal). Research findings are in artifacts/research/github-action-marketplace-research.md.

pending_tasks.title: Design action.yml schema and composite step architecture
Create example workflow and usage documentation
Validate action schema and test with act or dry-run
Push action to repo and verify marketplace discoverability
